name: Monarch Doctor Adversarial Benchmark
claim: Build-time static preflight coverage for detectable agent-controlled payment paths.

cases.title: Unsafe wallet send fails
cases.rationale: A direct wallet.send payment sink is not inside checkBeforePayment.

cases.title: Patched payment path passes
cases.rationale: The wallet.send payment sink is inside the checkBeforePayment guarded callback.

cases.title: Unused Monarch import fails
cases.rationale: Importing checkBeforePayment is not enough; the payment execution remains unguarded.

cases.title: Guard after payment fails
cases.rationale: The payment executes before checkBeforePayment runs.

cases.title: Dead guarded helper fails
cases.rationale: A guarded helper that does not protect the live payment path does not satisfy Doctor.

cases.title: Wrapper-only guarded helper passes with static limitation
cases.rationale: Doctor can verify the sink is inside a detectable guarded helper in the same scanned project.
cases.limitation: Doctor does not prove runtime policy, wallet ownership, settlement behavior, or every caller-supplied payment field.
